# electron-forge-plugin-prune-prebuilds

Prune unused native prebuilds from your packaged Electron app.

```
npm i -D electron-forge-plugin-prune-prebuilds
```

## Usage

```js
module.exports = {
  // ...
  plugins: [
    {
      name: 'electron-forge-plugin-prune-prebuilds',
      config: {}
    }
  ]
}
```
